## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md) and followed existing patterns in the touched package(s).
- [ ] Domain / UI copy changes are reflected in [docs/domain-specification.md](../docs/domain-specification.md) when applicable.
- [ ] User-facing routes or navigation changed → updated [docs/feature-catalog.md](../docs/feature-catalog.md) and [dev-import.sql](../src/main/resources/dev-import.sql) if needed.
- [ ] `./mvnw test` or `mvn test` passes locally (Chrome required for `@WebTest`).
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed.
